summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing of Tête de Mouette FiveM site. 22/22 backend pytest tests pass (auth, users, tutorials CRUD, RBAC). Frontend flows verified: home, tutorials list (12 seeded), tutorial detail, categories (7), about, login (creator+admin), protected /admin redirect, admin dashboard (creator sees Tutoriels+Utilisateurs tabs, admin sees only Tutoriels), tutorial CRUD via UI, user creation via UI, logout, invalid-login error. No critical issues.

issues: After deleting a tutorial the row briefly shows an empty title/description before refresh — cosmetic only, list count still updates (toast 'Tutoriel supprimé' shown). Not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: seed_users: when admin exists but password changed in .env, only the creator password is re-synced. Admin password drift is silently ignored (see server.py seed_users — else branch only for creator). Consider mirroring the 'update if password changed' logic for admin.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env (plain secret). OK for preview but should be rotated before production.

CORS_ORIGINS is set to '*' while allow_credentials=True in FastAPI CORS middleware. This is invalid per CORS spec; browsers ignore Access-Control-Allow-Origin:* when credentials=true. Since auth uses Bearer header (not cookies), it works for now, but explicit origins should be configured.
Public GET /api/tutorials filters featured/category/q but does not paginate. Fine for 12 items; add limit/skip if the catalog grows.
Admin PATCH /api/admin/tutorials/{id} uses TutorialIn (full body) rather than a partial model — behaves like PUT. Acceptable but document it or switch to optional-field model.

Route naming inconsistency risk: frontend uses /tutoriels/:slug (plural). Any external link or reviewer using /tutoriel/:slug will 404 silently (react-router warn). Consider adding a redirect for singular path.
test_credentials: Creator: createur@mouette.gg / Mouette2026! ; Admin: admin@mouette.gg / Admin2026! (verified via /api/auth/login)
seed_data_creation: None persisted. Test tutorial & test user created and deleted during runs; tests prefixed with TEST_ for traceability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route for tutorial detail is /tutoriels/:slug (plural). Admin dialog has no data-testid on title/description/steps fields — use input.inp (first is title) and textarea (first is description). Creator account is the only creator; DELETE self returns 400 (covered) and therefore 'cannot delete last creator' constraint is effectively tested via self-delete. Public GET /api/tutorials excludes unpublished; admin endpoints include all. bcrypt hashes start with $2b$ as verified via login round-trip.
